case_title: LUZ HOTEL VS. THOMAS GALLION et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUZ HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT GALLION, THOMAS MARBELLA, ROLANDO DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
